The point is not really to get leads, it's to look at which audience is most responsive, which persona is most responsive. Now what you want to look for for stability to make a call on yes this is this is going to be a winner is ideally either a thousand or two thousand impressions or over three leads so you know that if you've had more than three leads it's it's it's a good sign that it's going to come in at an average price of whatever that price is that if you've only had one lead and it's cost you $2 it's only one data point it's too premature to make that call. ## [06:11 - 07:22]

I'm going to pause this ad because it's doing really well and I've again I've kind of validated this it's five leads 287 it's working.
